data.title: RED test: gate-2b-blast-radius.sh behavioral tests
data.description:
Create tests/scripts/test-gate-2b-blast-radius.sh with behavioral bash tests. Each test creates temp dirs with controlled files and imports.

Tests:
1. test_convention_package_manifest — pyproject.toml -> annotation mentions "package manifest"
2. test_convention_ci_config — .github/workflows/ci.yml -> annotation mentions "CI config"
3. test_convention_entry_point — main.py -> annotation mentions "entry point"
4. test_fan_in_grep_fallback — 3 files import target, no ast-grep -> "imported by 3 modules"
5. test_fan_in_with_ast_grep — ast-grep available -> fan-in counted (skip if ast-grep not installed via command -v)
6. test_modifier_signal_type — signal_type always "modifier", never "primary"
7. test_emits_gate_signal_json — gate_id "2b", proper JSON structure
8. test_no_fan_in_no_convention — file not imported, not a convention -> triggered:false, no annotation
9. test_annotation_note_prefix — annotation starts with "Note:" and contains file path and context
10. test_multi_convention — file matches multiple heuristics -> annotation mentions all matched conventions

Triggered semantics: triggered=true only when noteworthy content exists (fan-in > 0 OR convention match). triggered=false when nothing found (no enrichment to offer).

.test-index: plugins/dso/scripts/gate-2b-blast-radius.sh: tests/scripts/test-gate-2b-blast-radius.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test-gate-2b-blast-radius.sh
- [ ] At least 10 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' tests/scripts/test-gate-2b-blast-radius.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 10)}'
- [ ] Tests create temp dirs (behavioral)
  Verify: grep -q 'mktemp\|tmp' tests/scripts/test-gate-2b-blast-radius.sh
- [ ] .test-index entry
  Verify: grep -q 'gate-2b-blast-radius' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
